title: Create platformio.ini and deploy.sh
description: Build config for RP2350B with earlephilhower core and deploy script

title: Port BSP I2C driver
description: bsp_i2c.h/.c — I2C1 on pins 6/7 at 400kHz for touch controller

title: Port DMA channel IRQ helper
description: bsp_dma_channel_irq.h/.c — IRQ1 multiplexer for DMA completion callbacks

title: Port PIO RGB display driver
description: pio_rgb.h/.c/.pio — PIO assembly + driver using pio1 (sync) and pio2 (data) with DMA

title: Port ST7262 LCD driver
description: bsp_st7262.h/.c — LCD init, brightness PWM on pin 40, depends on pio_rgb and dma_channel_irq

title: Port PSRAM allocator
description: psramlib/ — TLSF allocator + PSRAM QSPI init on pin 47, provides rp_mem_malloc for framebuffer

title: Port GT911 touch driver
description: bsp_gt911.h/.c — capacitive touch on I2C addr 0x5D, INT pin 16, RST pin 17

title: Port GUI_Paint drawing library
description: gui_paint/ — fonts + drawing primitives (lines, rectangles, circles, text)

title: Create hello world main.cpp
description: Wire all drivers together: init display, draw Hello World text + shapes, init touch

title: Build and verify display on hardware
description: First compile, flash, and test display on actual RP2350-Touch-LCD-4.3B board. Fixed PIO side 0 bug, switched to single-buffer mode.

title: Wire touch input into main loop
description: GT911 driver inits but loop() never calls touch read. Wire touch_if->read() and get_data() into loop, print coordinates to Serial.

title: Debug GT911 touch detection
description: GT911 init may be failing silently (10-retry timeout). Check serial output, verify I2C communication, ensure touch controller is responding.

title: Port screensaver demo from AMOLED project
description: Port 10-scene animated demo (ribbon, torus, plasma, metaballs, particles, wormhole, fractal, synthwave, swarm, kaleidoscope) from rp-2350-waveshare-touch-amoled-18. Adapt RGB565 byte order, replace AMOLED display calls with PIO RGB framebuffer, replace FT3168 touch with GT911, scale for 800x480.
